attacking_style: Versatile sprinter who excels in opportunistic scenarios: parasites rival leadouts in pure sprints (200m launch point), or attacks solo 5km out before climbs in breakaway situations when positioned correctly.
team_tactics: Frequently operates with minimal team support, parasiting rival leadouts (Bora repeatedly observed) when outnumbered. When supported, team uses decoy attacks or paces climbs for positioning rather than traditional sprint trains.
terrain_preference: Technical finales and reduced bunch sprints after selective climbs. Competitive on punchy terrain (beat Sagan at intermediate sprints on climbs). Exposed in pure flat power sprints against top-tier fastmen.
vulnerability: Lacks pure acceleration against elite sprinters (Jakobsen, Groenewegen). Cannot bridge gaps solo when distanced from front groups. Team leadout timing issues result in launching too early when isolated.
key_patterns: Parasites rival team leadouts when outnumbered, particularly Bora-Hansgrohe (observed 2017-2018 repeatedly).
Launches sprint at 200m marker consistently across multiple wins, precise distance timing.
Competitive for intermediate sprint points on climbs, beats pure sprinters on selective terrain.
Excels in chaotic/technical finales requiring positioning intelligence over pure power (4 wins 2017 Vuelta).
Operates effectively without full leadout support, superior individual positioning instincts in final kilometers.
Struggles with pure acceleration against top sprinters despite good positioning (Jakobsen/Groenewegen gaps).
form_trajectory: negative: Transitioned from sprint wins (2017-2019) to pure domestique role for UAE team leaders (2021-2023). Recent observations show tactical sacrifice work rather than personal results.
built_from: 2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 13
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 2
2021 La Vuelta ciclista a Espana Stage 2
2022 Ronde van Vlaanderen - Tour des Flandres
